summary: Tested MOSSERO luxury perfume site (React + FastAPI). 8/8 backend pytest tests pass and 12/12 frontend Playwright flow checks pass. Covered product catalog, contact submission (email_sent=false since RESEND_API_KEY empty — persisted to Mongo), checkout with Mongo persistence, and full end-to-end UI: home hero, nav, split cards (OURA/VELOURA), add-to-cart, cart qty update, checkout modal + order confirmation, contact form, Our Story pull-quote.

minor.issue: Logger is referenced on line 233 inside /api/contact before it is defined (logger = logging.getLogger(__name__) is at line 261, after app.include_router). Dead path currently because RESEND_API_KEY is empty, but will NameError as soon as Resend send fails with a key configured.

issues: Top nav links use a subtle text color that has low contrast over dark hero imagery (hero image bleeds behind transparent nav). Acceptable for luxury aesthetic but worth confirming WCAG on scroll-top state.

action_items: Move `logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)` above the /api/contact route (before app.include_router) in /app/backend/server.py so that Resend failure logging works once RESEND_API_KEY is provided.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: logger defined after its first usage in contact endpoint — will NameError when Resend send raises. Move logging.basicConfig/getLogger block to the top of the file.
server.py: EmailStr pydantic validation works; good that 422 is returned on invalid email. Consider stripping/validating message length to avoid abuse.
CORS is wide open ('*') with allow_credentials=True — browsers will reject; fine for demo but flag for prod.
No /api/health endpoint; /api/ root returns a message which is used for liveness — acceptable.
Contact endpoint persists email_error=None always when no key is set (good), email_sent=False returned (matches spec).
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: None; tests create TEST_ prefixed contact submissions and orders in MongoDB collections (contact_messages, orders). Not cleaned automatically.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Correct Navigation testids: nav-link-<label>, nav-cart-icon, cart-count-badge. Home split cards: split-card-oura, split-card-veloura. Product page: add-to-cart-btn, buy-now-btn, qty-increment/decrement. Cart: cart-increment-<slug>, cart-decrement-<slug>, cart-remove-<slug>, checkout-btn, checkout-modal, checkout-name/email/address/submit, order-confirmation, order-id. Contact: contact-name, contact-email-input (NOT contact-email), contact-message, contact-submit. RESEND_API_KEY is intentionally empty — contact returns email_sent=false and 200.
rca of the issue: N/A — no blocking issues found. Only one latent bug: logger used before defined in server.py (won't manifest until Resend is wired).
